Dialogue: エリクサーちょうだい！
Gimme an elixir!
キャンディちょうだい！
Gimme some candy!

イェ！
イェーーイ！
Yip! Yip yip!
いい祝祭だな、ルディ！
A marvelous festival, isn't it, Rudy?

木のぬくもり溢れる
玩具はいかがですか？
Our wooden creations are full of warmth and character.

うちの園芸師たちが育てた
自慢の品々よ
Everything is proudly grown by our very own botanists.
寒空の下で一杯どうだ？
Something to wet your whistle and warm you up?

チョコボとの
ふれあいはどう？
Would you like to meet our chocobos?
おいしいねぇ！
The punch is so good!
ほんとだねぇ！
Seriously!
A successful hunt! Well done, my friend!
A hunter must not waste! Carve Arkveld's hide, and take what you can!

いいのかい…！？
ありがとう、イゼーヌちゃん
For me? Isainne, you shouldn't have!

お兄さんにも贈り物
持ってきたの！
I have a little something for you too, Kamlito!

それじゃ
あとで貰いに行こう
Very well, I shall go and get some too.
これやっぱり美味しい！
You really ought to try this punch, Mother!
私は別のも気になるな！
I wonder what the other ones taste like!

親子
水入らずだな…
What a doting mother the guildmaster is!

新しいキンダープンシュも
ぜひ味わってくれ
Do sample the new kinds of kinderpunsch as well.

お姉ちゃん
ふわふわの従者さんだね！
Look, look! It's a fluffy little helper!
お菓子も持ってるよ！
Oh, and with sweet treats!
じっくり選びましょう
Take your time, my boy.

お土産
なにがいいかな？
I can't decide what to get him as a souvenir...
さあ、どうぞ
Witness Blitzen's spectacular illusions!
ぐぅぉぉぉっ！
Gwoooaaah!
すごいねぇ！
Whoa!
キラキラだぁ！
So sparkly!

わあ！
私も飲みたい！
Ooh, I'd love to try that!
一緒に行こう！
Let's go and get some!

ウルダハ風のも
配ってたんだ
They even have Ul'dahn punch!
私には派手だ…
Hm. Not my style.

あの赤い服
オッサンに似合いそう
I think you'd look quite fetching in that red, Radovan.

素晴らしいわ
季節限定の市とはね！
A seasonal market! What a wonderful idea!

温かいジュースにも
挑戦してみようかしら
Perhaps I should try my hand at a warm beverage too.
足を伸ばしたかいがあるな
Was worth makin' the trip, eh?

私たちも
いただいていきましょうか
Indeed. Let's go and have a mug ourselves, shall we?
…ああ、温まる
Ahhh, so blessedly warm…
粋な贈り物だ
I must say this is really thoughtful.
いい時期に来られたな！
We picked a good time to visit!

おいしい飲み物
もらってきたの
I just got this really tasty drink!

まあ！
よかったわね
Oh, how nice!

3人でも
なにか食べましょうか
Shall we go and find something to eat, too?

星芒マーケットへ
ようこそー！
Welcome to the Starlight Stalls!

ホッホッホウ！
ますますにぎやかですな！
Ho ho ho! How wonderful to see the stalls so lively!
スンスン…ブニャ…
<sniff> <sniff> Mroww...

トラル大陸からの
贈り物はいかがぁ？
So, what do you think of this little gift from Tural?

うまい！
いつかぜひ出店を…！
It's...<crunch>...delicious! We would love for you to...<munch>...have a stall here!

あらぁ、かわいい
ネコの子ね
Well now, do you have your eye on this taco, cat?

今度は誰か
誘ってみるか…
It would be nice to spend this magical time with someone special...
もう一杯もらったぜ！
I'm on my second mug!
Phew... <wheeze>
Almost done with this pile.
The snow keeps piling up...
At least all this shoveling keeps me warm.
The snow doesn't look so heavy when it falls.
I shall sleep well tonight!
I think something is buried here, too.
We won't know until the snow is gone.
Take that to the storehouse out back.
Understood.
Good work today. You've earned a short rest.
I could keep going...but I suppose rest will help me come back even stronger.
If only we had more help...
I'll ask a friend of mine if he wants to join us.
Is anything so sweet as this!?
Pace yourself. There will be more work to do tomorrow.
We're running low on supplies.
Understood. I'll arrange a delivery from Shelter.
Would you like to see us chisel the stone?
The altar is complete at last. May the ritual go well.
The spirits look so happy...
It's almost mealtime. I should begin preparations.
I suppose it's time to bring the corn to the kirkahryar house.
Once work is done, I can go play with the spirits...
Is there enough corn?
We must pour our hearts and souls into every batch.
It's breathtaking...
Indeed. A job well done.
Time to play! Time to play!
Yes, yes. Just give me a few moments to catch my breath.
Is this...us?
The spitting image, don't you agree?
Press this, and...
The flowers!
So pretty!
Magnificent, indeed.
It's as magnificent as they say. Don't you agree?

ご安心ください
私たちは旅芸人の一座でして…

Fear not, dear guest.
We are but humble mummers...
サワルナ！　サワルナ！
AUGH! Please, no poking! I'm not joking!
オオォッ…！
Oooh!

ホラ、休憩は終わりだ。
楽しんでくゼ！
Break time's over! Now we make merry!
すごい、本物みたーい！
Wow! Just like a real pudding!
噛まれたりしない？
It doesn't bite, does it...?
ぶにぶにしてる…
It's awfully squishy...
なーんだ、仮装だったのか！
What a convincing act you played!

パンプキンがこんなに…！
圧巻だな！
To see our pumpkins decorate Gridania is quite the honor!
丁寧に育てた甲斐があったよ
Our tireless efforts bore fruit! Or...gourds, I suppose.
ふむ…異状なし、か？
Hm. I'd best keep an eye on those fiends...

盛り上がってんな！
さすがコンチネンタル・サーカス!
Kami be praised! The Continental Circus has returned!

ククク…ここであれば
被り物をしていても紛れられよう
Costumed mummers everywhere... Why, I fit right in!

私もカボチャを被ったら
店長とおそろいになる…？
Perhaps I should don a pumpkin head of my own...
グチャグチャするな！！
Grrrgh... NO! TOUCHING!

我の新たな装いとして
カボチャもプリチーかもしれぬな！
Pumpkin heads may just be the stylish addition my wardrobe requires...
Dartorgor...is here?
Indeed. She always will be, so long as we remember her.
Hee hee! We love this game!
Getting...dizzy...
